rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to explore blogs and news updates.
The system shall permit users to leave at any time after viewing blogs and news updates.
The system shall enable users to create an account by providing their details.
The system shall check the provided details during account creation.
The system shall prevent users from proceeding if the provided details are incorrect during account creation.
The system shall allow users to sign in using a password after creating an account.
The system shall check the entered password during sign-in.
The system shall allow users to add a new case after signing in.
The system shall require users to select a category when adding a new case.
The system shall allow users to enter details for the selected category when adding a new case.
The system shall enable users to set reminders after entering case details.
The system shall allow users to upload related documents for their cases.
The system shall enable users to file something online after signing in.
The system shall allow users to download model forms after signing in.
The system shall enable users to view references after signing in.
The system shall allow users to provide feedback after signing in.
The system shall permit users to leave the system after completing their tasks.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can explore blogs and news updates.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person can start by either exploring blogs and news updates or by creating an account.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can leave after viewing blogs and news updates at any time.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to view blogs and news, they can read the available updates and leave whenever they want.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can create an account by providing their details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they decide to create an account, they provide their details, which are then checked.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: System checks the provided details during account creation.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they decide to create an account, they provide their details, which are then checked.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users cannot proceed if the provided details are incorrect during account creation.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the details are not accepted, they cannot continue.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can sign in using a password after creating an account.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If everything is correct, they sign in using their password.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: System checks the entered password during sign-in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the password is incorrect, they cannot continue. If it is correct, they can view case-related information and logs.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can add a new case after signing in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After signing in, the person can choose what they want to do next. They may add a new case...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users select a category when adding a new case.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...they first select a category. The case can belong to either civil or criminal.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users enter details for the selected category when adding a new case.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After choosing the category, they enter the case details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can set reminders after entering case details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the details are added, they can set a reminder and then upload the related documents.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can upload related documents for their cases.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the details are added, they can set a reminder and then upload the related documents.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can file something online after signing in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to file something online, they select a category and follow a link that takes them to another location, after which they come back.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can download model forms after signing in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to download model forms, they select the form they need and download it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can view references after signing in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they go to the reference section, they select a category and then choose between quick references or books to view the information.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can provide feedback after signing in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they decide to give feedback, they write and submit their feedback.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can leave the system after completing their tasks.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After finishing what they want to do, they leave the system.
